hero.headline: Everything on your plate,
hero.subheadline: Text anything to Clarityboards. AI figures out the rest — dates, checklists, which board it belongs on. No app switching. No formatting.
hero.pricingNote: Free forever · Pro from $4.99/mo · No app download required

demo.noItems: No items on this board yet.

sms.headline: Just text it.
sms.subheadline: No app to open, no form to fill. Send a text like you'd send to a friend — AI handles the rest.
sms.name: Clarityboards

maria.userText: Jake's soccer tournament Saturday 8am, bring snacks for 12 kids

maria.result: Appeared instantly in ActivityBoard — date, time, even the snack reminder.

priya.result: The checklist built itself. She opened the app to find it already organized.

derek.userText: Applied to Google SWE role today, follow up in 2 weeks if no response
derek.appText: ✅ Added to CareerBoard: "Google SWE application" · submitted · follow-up reminder Mar 30 📅
derek.result: Application logged, follow-up scheduled — without opening the app once.

• "Buy wine for dinner party" → TaskBoard

features.headline: Everything you need.
features.subheadline: Built for real life — not productivity theater.

capture.title: Text to capture
capture.desc: Send any message to your Clarityboards number. AI parses dates, checklists, deadlines — no formatting needed.

boards.title: 5 smart boards
boards.desc: EventBoard, StudyBoard, ActivityBoard, CareerBoard, TaskBoard. Items auto-route to the right one.

share.title: Share any board
share.desc: Invite family, teammates, or classmates to a specific board. Editor or view-only access, per board.

priority.title: Priority & tags
priority.desc: Flag high-priority items, tag by person or project, filter instantly. See exactly what needs attention.

calendar.title: Calendar export
calendar.desc: Every item with a date syncs to Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, or any iCal app.

recurring.title: Recurring items
recurring.desc: Daily standups, weekly reviews, monthly bills — set it once and it reappears automatically.

pricing.headline: Simple pricing.
pricing.subheadline: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.

cta.headline: Ready to get your life
cta.subheadline: Join families, students, and professionals who text their way to organized.
cta.footnote: No credit card · Cancel anytime · Works from any phone

onboarding.headline: Pick your 2 boards.
onboarding.subheadline: Choose the two areas of life you want to organize first.
onboarding.upgradeNote: Upgrade to Pro anytime to unlock all five —

dashboard.upgradeUnlock: Unlock everything Clarityboards has to offer

common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

welcome.title: Welcome to Clarityboards 🎉
welcome.body: You've got events, school, activities, career moves, and a to-do list that never quits. Clarityboards is one place for all of it. Let's take a 60-second tour.

boards.title: Your Boards
boards.body: Each board is tuned for a different part of your life. EventBoard for milestones, StudyBoard for school, ActivityBoard for kids, CareerBoard for work, TaskBoard for everything else.

addItem.title: Add anything in seconds
addItem.body: Hit + to add an item to any board. Give it a title, a date, a status — done. Takes about 10 seconds.

checklist.title: Break it down with checklists
checklist.body: Every item has a built-in checklist. Add steps, check them off as you go. Watch the progress bar fill up.

status.title: Smart status tags
status.body: Status labels are tuned to each board. EventBoard has RSVP Needed, Accepted, Declined. CareerBoard has Applied, In Progress. Not just generic 'To Do'.

unified.title: Everything in one feed
unified.body: Switch to All Boards view to see every item from every board, sorted by date. One scroll to know what's coming up across your whole life.

upgrade.title: Want all 5 boards?
upgrade.body: You're on the Free plan with 2 boards. Upgrade to Pro for $4.99/mo (or $49.99/yr) to unlock all 5 boards plus SMS and email forwarding — coming soon.

done.title: You're all set! 🚀
done.body: That's Clarityboards. Add your first real item, check off a task, or just explore. You can replay this tour anytime from the Help menu.

tour.skipTour: Skip tour, take me to the dashboard
tour.tourCompleteBody: Tour complete. Head to your dashboard and add your first item — it takes about 10 seconds.
tour.welcomeBody: One platform for every part of your busy life. Let's take a quick tour — it only takes 60 seconds.

settingsPhone.title: SMS Forwarding
settingsPhone.subtitle: Text items directly to your boards
howItWorks: AI reads your message and adds it to the right board automatically
Dates, times, checklists, urgency — all parsed from natural language
Try: "Soccer game Friday 4pm" or "Pick up: milk, eggs, bread"
settingsPhone.label: Mobile number
settingsPhone.hint: US numbers: enter 10 digits (we'll add +1). International: include country code (+44...).
settingsPhone.savedPhone: Phone number saved! You can now text your boards.
settingsPhone.twilioBody: SMS forwarding will activate once our number (+1 877-318-9322) completes carrier verification — typically 3–7 business days. Your number will be ready to go the moment it clears.
settingsPhone.errorInvalid: Enter a valid US number (10 digits) or international format (+1...)

settingsIcal.title: Calendar Export (iCal)
settingsIcal.subtitle: Subscribe in Apple Calendar, Google Calendar, or Outlook

settingsSharing.title: Board Sharing
settingsSharing.subtitle: Invite people to collaborate on specific boards
settingsSharing.noInbound: No boards have been shared with you yet.
